resources.string: The maximum number of images is %1$d
Please enter a valid number for bookings per time slot
The trip has not started yet
Please allow %s to access your calendar so we can synchronize your events.
Only admins are authorized to access this section.
Note: Bots are granted automatic admin access.
Add your friend who registered for %1$s by email address
Add your friend who registered for %1$s by phone number
Are you sure you want to add %s to your contacts?
This address will be visible to your group members.
Allow access to external storage to download your media files.
Allow audio file access to send and store audio files.
Allow access to photos to share and save photos.
Allow video access to share and keep video clips.
Allow family contacts to call me
Allow friend contacts to call me
Allow notifications for %s to stay in the loop and never miss any updates!
Allow work contacts to call me
Anything else you want to tell us?
This app is currently offline pending renewal.\n Please contact the app’s administrator.
Apt, suite, unite, building, floor, etc.
Are you sure to delete this Bot?
Are you sure you want to permanently close this bot? Subscribers will no longer be able to access this bot. This action cannot be undone.
Automatic backup is not turned on. Please enable backup to keep your messages safe.
Ensure your chat history is secure by backing it up. If you lose your phone or switch devices, you can retrieve your chats by restoring them upon reinstalling %1$s.
Inactive chat, please contact the administrator.
Inactive group, please contact the administrator.
You must set your billing country
Billing email is empty or invalid
Billing first name can\'t be empty
Billing last name can\'t be empty
Billing phone number can\'t be empty
Too many attempts, Please try again later.
Booking description must not exceed 100 characters.
Enter the estimated duration of your session.
Booking name must not exceed 22 characters.
This name will be visible to your booking members. It is not recommended to change it often as the booking is identified to your booking members by its image and name.
Please set max number of bookings per account
Bookings per account can\'t exceed total number of bookings
This description will be visible to your booking members. Describing your booking nature as close as possible will increase your booking visibility.
Enter the waiting period of time before starting a session.
Please check start and end time
Describe the bot’s function and how to use it. This information will be provided to bot users for the first time.
To create a Bot Username without _nb, return to the previous screen, and change the Bot Type to \"Business\".
This name will be visible to your BOT members. It is not recommended to change it often as the BOT is identified to your BOT members by its image and name.
This Bot is no longer active
This description will be visible to your BOT members. Describing your BOT nature as close as possible will increase your BOT visibility.
Give your bot a unique username. Users will be able to find and share the bot using its username.
A bot for business or organizational usage.
Call disconnected, please make sure your phone has internet connection
Allow access to call log to verify your number.
Please allow %s to receive calls so we can verify your phone number.
Are you sure you want to cancel your Current booking?
Are you sure to cancel this ticket?
Cannot book - Booking period not available.
Cannot book - Selected booking not available.
Cannot cancel - Cancel is not allowed for this booking.
Google account is not set or can\'t access Google drive, tap to set account or grant access.
Booking Unavailable: Selected time has passed.
Can\'t choose more than %1$d options of %2$s
Can\'t share more than 10 media items
Can\'t share to more than 10 destinations
Looks like you haven\'t added any items yet, start shopping now!

You can change your email here.

Important: The address books of your %s contacts will be automatically updated with your new email.

Your blocked contacts will not receive this update.

You can change your phone number here. 

Important: The address books of your %s contacts will be automatically updated with your new phone number. 

Your blocked contacts will not receive this update.
Broadcast channel with reply for an unlimited audience.
Channel description must not exceed 100 characters.
Channel name must not exceed 22 characters.
This name will be visible to your channel members. It is not recommended to change it often as the channel is identified to your channel members by its image and name.
This description will be visible to your channel members. Describing your channel nature as close as possible will increase your channel visibility.
Please select at least one member
Please check your mobile number or country code
Please check your internet connection and try again.
Please enter the verification code sent to the email you entered.
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
You’ll be redirected to complete checkout on the merchant’s website
I\'d like to add you to my contacts
This user has deleted their account.
We will need your permission to upload your contacts to %1$s\'s server to help you quickly get in touch with your friends and help us provide a better experience.
Replies to the same message are\ngrouped together for easy chatting.
Couldn\'t restore your backup, please try again
Cannot send contact as it does not contain a phone number. Please enter a phone number for the contact.
Bots are third-party applications that run inside %1$s. Create a bot easily using %1$s\'s API.
Your current location is not available yet.
Purchase deadline days must be between 0 and 31
Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
If you delete all chats, all your messages and chats will be deleted.
Media will only be deleted from your %1$s media but they may still be saved on your device. Also, media will not be recalled from the receiver\'s device.
Your account and all your saved data will be permanently deleted.
Deleting your account, please do not close the application.
-Sign in to nandbox Native App Builder \n-Scan your app QR code in Release section to star testing your app.
Note: Some features might not work until the app has been published in the app store.
Are you sure you want to dismiss %1$s as an admin?
Allow read access to your device\'s phone number to detect it.
This device has been banned for violating the Terms and Conditions, if you think this is a mistake, please contact us at %2$s.
Disallowing users from adding Bot to channels/groups.
Are you sure you want to discard %s
Do you want to cancel current trip?
Enter the code we sent to your email
Enter the verification code that was sent to your email address.
This catalog doesn’t have any content right now.
Your name can not be empty
You must fill virtual app name
You must fill virtual app name
Enabling this option will publish the product.
Please enter a valid price step
Please enter a valid price step
Please use Business Email, Free Emails are not allowed in verifying Business Bot
The status must not exceed 100 characters.
Only chat admins can perform this action.
You must be a member of this chat to perform this action.
An error occurred please try again
Please assign a unique username to the bot.
Verification Code expired , please request new code
Please note that is event has been cancelled.
This name will be visible to your event members. It is not recommended to change it often as the event is identified to your event members by its image and name.
This description will be visible to your event members. Describing your event nature as close as possible will increase your event visibility.
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Sports, lifestyle, media and more Channels are waiting you to join!
Bring your thoughts to life with stickers.
go to Settings, Permissions, allow access to Phone.
There is not enough space available on your Google Drive, please free up at least %1$s and then try again.
Discussion group for up to 50000 members.
Group Description must not exceed 100 characters.
Group Name must not exceed 22 characters.
This name will be visible to your group members. It is not recommended to change it often as the group is identified to your group members by its image and name.
This description will be visible to your group members. Describing your group nature as close as possible will increase your group visibility.
You already have another booking in selected time , Are you sure you want to proceed ?
This app release requires a higher plan.\n Please contact the app’s administrator to upgrade your plan.
Tap and hold sticker to preview
Purchase deadline hours must be between 0 and 24
How much do you wanna donate?
I want to book an appointment on
Users will be able to call the bot from within their chats.
The number you entered is invalid. Please check and re-enter the number.
The transaction cannot be processed, due to invalid payment configuration.
Please set valid street adderess or P.O. Box
You have been invited to be an admin of this %s.
You have been invited to join this %s.
You have been invited to be a super admin of this %s.
This invitation message will be sent to the person whom you would like to connect with along with the invitation request.
Send admin invitation to selected contacts?
Hi, %1$s! messenger is a free instant messaging app. We can chat with funny stickers, join many channels, have multiple profiles, and much more features are there waiting for us! Check it now! %2$s
The Message must not exceed 100 characters.
I\'d like to connect with you on %s.
Invite your friends to start chatting.
invited you to the following event:
This item is no longer available.
Keep your conversations going no matter where you are. Let’s get started!
If you don\'t share your last seen status, you won\'t be able to see other people\'s last seen statuses.
There is not enough space on the device, please free up at least %1$s and then try again.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
The Address must not exceed 200 characters.
Please note that each session duration shouldn\'t exceed 24 hours.
The Booking Name must not exceed 22 characters.
The booking description must not exceed 100 characters.
Please note that the waiting period shouldn\'t exceed 1440 minutes.
The BOT About must not exceed 500 characters.
The BOT Name must not exceed 22 characters.
The BOT Description must not exceed 100 characters.
The Channel Name must not exceed 22 characters.
The channel description must not exceed 100 characters.
The Event Name must not exceed 22 characters.
The event description must not exceed 100 characters.
The Group Name must not exceed 22 characters.
The Group Description must not exceed 100 characters.
The justification must not exceed 100 characters.
Special requests must not exceed 100 characters.
Name is required and must not exceed 22 characters.
The virtual app description must not exceed 100 characters.
The Virtual App Name must not exceed 22 characters.
Maximum price must be greater than minimum price
You can only select %d media files.
You haven\'t granted access to your photos and videos.
To save disk space, %1$s will retain text messages, photos, videos, and other media on this device for the time period you set above.
Purchase deadline minutes must be between 0 and 60
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Must choose at least %1$d options of %2$s
You must upgrade to the latest version
Add contacts to each of your profiles. Your contacts will only see the information in the assigned profile.
This is not your username or pin. This name will be visible to your Family contacts
This is not your username or pin. This name will be visible to your Friend contacts
This is not your username or pin. This name will be visible to the Public
This is not your username or pin. This name will be visible to your Work contacts
It is recommended to upgrade to the latest version
No backup files found, Ensure your chat history is secure by backing it up. If you lose your phone or switch devices, you can retrieve your chats by restoring them upon reinstalling %1$s.
No backup file found change Google account or abort restore to continue.
No backup file found in %1$s google drive, do you want to change account?
Invite friends to connect with you and start calling!
Invite friends to connect with you and start chatting!
Please make sure you are connected to the internet and try again
Please use your Phone Contacts to add new contact, or use the bottom menu to add a Contact using QR scan.
Favorites is a short list for favorite contacts that you chat with often.
To create a new group, press the more button in the top right corner of the screen.
No Chat groups or Channels yet
Favorites is a short list of the Groups you chat with most often.
Favorite messages is where you can find all chats for favorite Contacts and favorite Groups.
Other messages is where you can find all chats for non-favorite Contacts and non-favorite Groups.
You don’t have any orders in your history.
Sorry, this item is currently unavailable. You can Try another search or explore other items.
There are no products available in this branch yet.
Sorry, there are no products listed in this collection.
There is no availability on this %1$s. Please choose another one.

Pending invitation is a request from a User to connect with you, or from a Channel or Group to join, or an Administrator invites you to take an Administrator role.If you accept invitation from a user, the mobile numbers will be exchanged among you and the new contact.
Sorry, you are not allowed to sign up for this app. Please contact the administrator.
Not available now please try again
You must enter a Bot title to continue.
You are no longer a participant in this %1$s
We will notify you before the trip

nandbox Messenger

More features, better privacy, and advanced chat options!

Free Messaging

One-to-one chats with seamless media sharing options.

Groups & Channels

Chat with large groups of 50,000 members and enjoy unlimited channels.

Multiple Profiles

Personalize your chats with multiple profiles.

Speed Dialer

Gain swift access to your favorite contacts with a simple tap

Sync Your Contacts

Register with your phone number and your contacts will be synced!

Video & Voice Calls

High quality video and audio calls for better communication.
We\'ll alert you an hour before your appointment

Free Messaging

One-to-one chats with seamless media sharing options.

Groups & Channels

Chat with large groups of 50,000 members and enjoy unlimited channels.

Multiple Profiles

Personalize your chats with multiple profiles.

Speed Dialer

Gain swift access to your favorite contacts with a simple tap.

Sync Your Contacts

Register with your phone number and your contacts will be synced!

Video & Voice Calls

High quality video and audio calls for better communication.

nandbox Pro

More features, better privacy, and advanced chat options!
You\'ve given access to a select number of photos and videos.
Please check the available slots before purchase
Peer not supports video call, call will be switched to audio
You need to grant access to %s
Please allow %s to identify your device and receive calls so we can verify your phone number
Enter your %s number, we will send you a verification code to confirm your number.
Please allow %s to identify your device and receive calls so we can verify your phone number.
Allow access to phone state to identify your phone ID.
Please allow %s to identify your device so that we can complete your registration.
Enter the code we sent to your %s number
Enter the verification code that was sent to your %s.
Please enter your justification for your report
Please enter a valid number for the maximum bookings per user
Please set at least one time slot
Are you sure to post selected messages to Channel?
Postal code can\'t be empty and must be 5 digits
Posts published will be shown here
Private bots will not appear in search results.
New members can join by invitation only.
New members can join by invitation only.
Are you sure you want to promote %1$s to Super Admin ? Super Admins have full control over %2$s. This action cannot be undone.
Channel is publicly available, anyone can join.
This status will be visible to your Family contacts
This status will be visible to your Friend contacts
This status will be visible to the Public
This status will be visible to your Work contacts
If you turn off read receipts, you won\'t be able to see read receipts from other people.
Please connect to internet before recall message(s)
Your region is not currently supported but it will be soon! Please check with us later.
You need to register to access this section.
Your Reply will appear to\n %s only
Please allow %1$s a permission to add shortcut home screen from Settings->Apps
If you do not get an SMS in 10 minutes please try resend
Backup can\'t be restored without granting access to Google Drive
Couldn\'t restore your backup, please check your internet connection and try again.
Restore your data from your last backup.
Your app is outdated, please update your app and try again
Backup is not compatible with your device, please select another backup account and try again
The email address entered matches your current email, please enter a different email address
The phone number entered matches your current phone number, please enter a different phone number.
Place the code in the center of the square.\n It will be scanned automatically.
Scan this QR code to join.
Find what you are looking for!
Search for channels or start your own!
Secure Checkout. You will be redirected to an external website
Please enter a valid value for available tickets
Please select a valid end time
Please enter a valid value for maximum tickets per account
Please select a valid start time
You must send the SMS verification message from your phone to validate your mobile number.
• Please select your SMS application then click \"Send\"
• Local SMS charges may be applied.
Download the file first to be able to send it

Join %1$s %2$s by clicking the following link
%3$s,

 Or scan the attached Qr code
Join %1$s %2$s by scanning the attached Qr code

Attached image is the %1$s QR code for %2$s, 


 Get %1$s app from %3$s
Please enter a valid number for the gap between time slots
Please enter a valid number for the time slot duration
This bot would like to know your location each time you send it a request. This can be used to provide location-specific results.
The bot will know your phone number. This can be useful for integration with other services.
Shipping email address can\'t be empty
Shipping first name can\'t be empty
Shipping last name can\'t be empty
Shipping phone number can\'t be empty
Shipping address same as billing address
Set your shipping address to your billing address
Choose one of the following methods to send a verification code on it.
How would you like to get your verification code?
A new order will clear your current cart
Start time must be before end time
Are you sure you want to accept this calendar?
Your free trial or \n subscription has expired!
I agree to the terms and conditions
The available stock for this item is only %1$d.
There are no appointments on this day
This user is no longer admin in this %1$s or left the %1$s
This booking is no longer available
This event is about to begin
This event will start on %1$s at %2$s
Show posts from this channel on your timeline.
The selected time range overlaps with an existing slot. Please adjust the times
To create a new channel, press the more button in the top right corner of the screen.
To create a new virtual app, press the more button in the top right corner of the screen.
To proceed with this call you need to enable voice calls.
To use %1$s, we request your permission to:
To disable all incoming calls, turn off this setting.
You have been banned. If you think this is a mistake, please contact the app administrator.
Create your Virtual App and reach millions of %1$s users instantly.
This description will be visible to your virtual app members. Describing your virtual app nature as close as possible will increase your virtual app visibility.
Are you sure to accept invitation
Are you sure to block this Contact?
Are you sure to decline this invitation?
Are you sure you want to close %1$s?
Are you sure to cancel this booking?
Are you sure you want to delete messages in this chat?
Are you sure to delete this event?
Are you sure you want to delete this event? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s?
Are you sure to delete this contact with all chat history
Are you sure to leave the event?
Are you sure you want to leave %1$s?
Please note that changing the event status will also remove this event from your calendar.
Are you sure to publish this BOT?
Are you sure to reject invitation
Report abuse and leave this event
Do you want to report Spam?
Your video must be less than 20MB
Virtual app description must not exceed 100 characters.
Virtual App name must not exceed 22 characters.
This name will be visible to your virtual app members. It is not recommended to change it often as the virtual app is identified to your virtual app members by its image and name.
Please wait until all images are uploaded
Please wait until all media are uploaded
Incoming call to verify your phone number, do not answer
Android OS versions prior to Lollipop do not support voice and video calls.
Welcome to %s, get ready to unlock your chatting capabilities! Sign up now and enjoy the new experience
Where do you want to go?
This %1$s may be closed, or you are no longer a participant.
You\'re currently offline. Please connect to the Internet in order to make calls.
Let your friends scan this QR code to add you
You have already canceled your subscription which will end on %1$s
Your subscription will be canceled at the end of your billing period on %1$s
Sorry, the Android camera encountered a problem. You may need to restart the device.
Place the code in the center of the square.\n It will be scanned automatically.
